page_metadata.bioconda__summary: High-performance stochastic modeling of DNA loop extrusion interactions
page_metadata.biotools__summary: MoDLE is a computational tool for fast, stochastic modeling of molecular contacts from DNA loop extrusion capable of simulating realistic contact patterns genome wide in a few minutes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MoDLE is a computational tool for fast, stochastic modeling of molecular contacts from DNA loop extrusion capable of simulating realistic contact patterns genome wide in a few minutes.
